claude-subagent.description: Claude Code subagent — dispatched via Task tool within the session
claude-subagent.notes: Use /dispatch skill to send independent tasks to parallel subagents

codex.notes: Requires codex-plugin-cc installed. One active request at a time (JSON-RPC broker queues).

gemini.description: Gemini CLI via scripts/gemini-ask.js — direct subprocess, no Docker
gemini.notes: Requires: npm install -g @google/gemini-cli && gemini auth. Use /gemini skill.
